ⓘ Assumptions & Methodology Click to expand ▼
  • Features, Calls, Reports: Feature mentions, sentiment, and signals are extracted by Claude from Fireflies.ai call transcripts. Accuracy depends on transcript quality and model interpretation. Calls without recordings or with poor audio are excluded.
  • Win/Loss: Signals come from HubSpot deal properties: closed-won Notes, closed-lost customer feedback notes, product-limitation markers, and competitor fields. No call transcripts are used. Dollar values are associative, not causal. They show the combined value of deals where a signal appeared, not proof the signal caused the outcome.
  • Estimated deal values: Deals missing an amount are estimated at $6,000 (base enterprise cost). Marked with ~ throughout.
  • Personas: Buyer personas are inferred by AI from job title, language, and conversation context. They are not CRM-verified.
  • Competitors: Competitor data comes from two sources: AI extraction from call transcripts (Competitors tab) and HubSpot structured fields (Win/Loss tab). A prospect mentioning a competitor does not confirm they are using or evaluating that product.
  • Performance: Pipeline and activity metrics come from HubSpot CRM and Mixmax. Data syncs periodically, so recent activity may not yet be reflected.
  • Prospecting: Account and contact data is sourced from Clay. Enrichment accuracy depends on Clay's upstream data providers.
  • Sentiment is directional: Positive/negative/neutral labels reflect tone in context, not objective product quality. A "negative" mention may be constructive feedback.
